notes.subject: Steritech 99% — 2065 Acknowledged
notes.body: Way to go Bobby & Crystal! Steritech STRONG! — Brad Davis. FGE FBM Kevin Goyke also sent congratulations: 'Congrats on the now 99% food safety audit result here! Excellent work!' Score: 98 base, challenged to 99. Zero criticals. Low risk.

notes.subject: Let's get Steritech — Food Safety #1 Priority
notes.body: 4 locations still remaining for Steritech this quarter (Muncie, Kokomo, New Albany, Outerloop). District average 97.71%. 100% is the goal. 2065 is ahead — keep the standards up every shift.

notes.subject: Performance Foodservice — NO DELIVERY May 25 (Memorial Day)
notes.body: Monday May 25 Memorial Day — no delivery. Mon + Tue deliveries combined on Tuesday May 26. Order early this week to cover the long weekend. Frozen proteins and buns are the risk items.

notes.subject: Steritech Win + Crystal Visit + Blackberry LTO Active
notes.body: 99% on Steritech — zero criticals. Brad and FGE both acknowledged 2065 by name. Crystal is visiting locations this week — have the Shopper Dashboard on the comm board and be ready to walk KPI rankings. Blackberry LTO POS is LIVE (activated May 18). Mix on bottom row, confirm price point is set, FGU complete for all shift leads.

notes.subject: 5/17 Cash $40 OVER — Verify
notes.body: CrunchTime shows $40.00 over on 5/17. Verify with closing manager — confirm deposit was correct and no re-ring situations. 5/18 came back even. Follow up before banking today.
